report.summary: Standup v7 Apr 4: Since v6 — full 6-agent rotation completed. Build-v6 shipped Celestia TIA + zkSync Era guides (20 total today). Community-v7 drafted tweets #525-529, newsletter v58, 3 SVGs (Drift hack, 5 tools, ETH DeFi TVL). Design-v5 audited 16 pages, created 2 OG images, fixed 7 UX issues. EOD-v6 QA-verified both new pages. Publish-v5 blocked (queue exhausted). Staging now 128 learn pages. BTC ~$66,868, F&G 9-29 (source-dependent). Production still frozen — 39th escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE v6 → v7: Full 6-agent rotation completed. build-v6 (Celestia TIA + zkSync Era guides), design-v5 (16-page UX audit, 2 OG images, 7 UX fixes on Celestia page), community-v7 (tweets #525-529, newsletter v58 'When DeFi Bleeds Builders Build', 3 social card SVGs — Drift hack, 5 tools launch, ETH DeFi TVL), eod-v6 (QA verified both new pages), publish-v5 (blocked — queue exhausted, both remaining entries need page.tsx).
PUBLISHED PAGES: 704 entries in published-pages.ts (prod). Staging: 128 learn page directories (+2 from v6). No new promotions this cycle — publish queue exhausted.

CONTENT VELOCITY: 20 learn guides built today across 6 build cycles (~55,000+ words). Latest 2: Celestia TIA Modular DA (~3,000 words) + zkSync Era Elastic Chain (~2,800 words). All 20 pass metadata + JSON-LD validation.

COMMUNITY OUTPUT (since v6): 5 tweets (#525-529) covering Drift $285M hack + DeFi Risk Scorer CTA, 702 pages milestone, 5 new tools thread, ETH DeFi TVL $68.4B growth, weekend market snapshot. Newsletter v58. 3 social card SVGs. Discord/Telegram weekly announcement. Cumulative: 529+ tweets, 58 newsletters.

DESIGN OUTPUT (since v6): 2 OG images (og-celestia-tia-modular.svg, og-zksync-era-ecosystem.svg). Full UX audit of all 16 pages built today — Celestia page had 7 issues fixed (responsive typography, a11y, semantic nav, touch targets). 104+ learn pages still missing OG images (down from 106).

MARKET (web search confirmed): BTC ~$66,868 (flat 24h, -0.82%). F&G Index: 9 (Extreme Fear per CoinGabbar) to 29 (Fear per other sources) — discrepancy across providers. Crypto market cap $2.38T. Stablecoins $316B ATH. BTC had first green month since September. Drift Protocol $285M hack is top news.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel. Market data confirmed via web search. No live traffic delta available.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SINCE v6: Full rotation — build-v6 (2 guides), design-v5 (2 OG images + 7 UX fixes + 16-page audit), community-v7 (5 tweets + newsletter v58 + 3 SVGs), eod-v6 (QA on 2 new pages), publish-v5 (blocked — queue empty).
TODAY'S TOTAL: 32 agent runs (standup×7, build×6, community×7, design×5, eod×6, publish×1). $2,953 human-equivalent cost. This is standup #7 today.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (39TH ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. 131+ uncommitted files in prod repo. 704 published slugs in registry, 128 staging learn pages, 20 guides built today — all invisible to users and crawlers. 7 UX fixes, 2 new OG images, SEO bug patches all undeployed. Drift $285M hack creates URGENT context for DeFi Risk Scorer tool — but it's trapped in staging. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — QUEUE REFILL + SCAFFOLD: PUBLISH_QUEUE exhausted — 2 entries remain (monad-guide, zora — both need page.tsx). Scaffold these then refill queue with 20-50 pages from ~638 orphan inventory. Publish agent has been idle for 2+ cycles.
P2 — SEO BUG: jupiter-dex-aggregator still has 'use client' + metadata export conflict (1 remaining of original 5).

P3 — TECHNICAL DEBT: 111 phantom published slugs (missing page.tsx → 404s). 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking). 0/6 API routes rate-limited. 2/6 routes with fallback data. 104+ learn pages missing OG images.
P4 — CARRY-OVER: mev-guide and solana-vs-ethereum warn status. defi-yields API hardening deferred. market-metrics 404 on prod.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 39TH ESCALATION): 131+ uncommitted files. 20 guides built today. 5 promoted tool pages from earlier cycles. 529+ tweets + 58 newsletters drafted. 7 UX/a11y fixes ready. Drift Protocol $285M hack is TODAY'S headline — our DeFi Risk Scorer tool is the perfect response, but it's trapped in staging. F&G mixed (9-29) signals early recovery — deploy captures returning search demand. This is a $0 action with maximum ROI. Every hour = compounding opportunity cost.

PRIORITY 2 — SCAFFOLD + QUEUE REFILL: Queue exhausted. Scaffold monad-guide + zora page.tsx. Refill with 50-page batch from ~638 orphan pool targeting high-value categories. Keep publish agent productive. Without this, publish cycles run idle.

PRIORITY 3 — OG IMAGE BATCH: 104+ learn pages still missing OG images. Design agent can batch 10-20 per cycle. Social sharing CTR directly impacts organic reach — especially important with Drift hack news creating social traffic spike opportunity.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $2,953 (32 runs: standup×7=$315, build×6=$1,398, community×7=$287, design×5=$300, eod×6=$378, publish×1=$275)

report.email: Resend API blocked by browser CORS (Failed to fetch from example.com context). Consistent with all prior cycles. Report saved to reports/ in both workspaces.
